scene:cuboid_orthographic_views_scene.object_description: front, right, and top orthographic rectangular views of one cuboid, each labeled with that view's perimeter
scene:cuboid_orthographic_views_scene.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON object with exactly these keys: "top_view", "front_view", and "right_view"; each value must be the pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the full visible rectangular view
scene:cuboid_orthographic_views_scene.answer_hint: set "answer" to the cuboid total surface area as an integer
